title: Escuela de vagabundos
writer: Jack Jevne, Paulino Masip, Fernando de Fuentes
actors: Pedro Infante, Miroslava, Blanca de Castejón
plot: Alberto Medina is a very famous composer and is on a field trip when his car runs out of gas and goes downhill. While looking for help, he finds the Valverdes' house and is welcome by Emilia, the mother of the family, who is known...
